extraction.one_line_summary: HIRSCHY Marc solo attacked miles from finish on uphill finale, won by 47 seconds over ROLLAND, taking advantage of GC teams unwilling to chase.
tactical_patterns: Hirschy attacked miles before uphill finish knowing 1h07m deficit meant GC teams wouldn't organize chase.
Deceuninck led out Bennett for 7th-place intermediate sprint showing total commitment to green jersey over energy conservation.
Martin crash within opening kilometers demonstrates category-2 summit 8-second bonus incentivized dangerous early positioning from GC riders.

rider_signals.HIRSCHY Marc: positive: 22 years old, 1h07m down overall yet still had legs for long-range solo attack on uphill finish
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: consistently slower than Bennett in every sprint confrontation including intermediate sprints for minor points
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: Morkov held leadout to line for 7th-place intermediate sprint showing Deceuninck's total tactical commitment
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: neutral: crashed in opening kilometers while positioned aggressively near front for 8-second bonus on category-2 climb
rider_signals.ROLLAND Pierre: positive: finished 47 seconds down after following Hirschy's move, promising form with mountains approaching despite 21st at 20 minutes
